authors: C. T. Elliott; John Melngailis; T. C. Harman; J. A. Kafalas; W. C. Kernan
title: Pressure Dependence of the Carrier Concentrations in p-Type Alloys of Hg1-xCdxTe at 4.2 and 77 K
primary_gap_observable: Kane k.p zero-pressure signed gap inferred from pressure-dependent electron concentration
pressure_medium: helium gas; solid helium at 4.2 K with stated pressure-history systematic
field_protocol: Hall coefficient; resistivity; transverse and longitudinal magnetoconductivity; Shubnikov-de Haas
notes: Hansen's magneto-optical classification is corrected to pressure-dependent magnetotransport. Copyrighted source binary not committed.
